CREATE ROLE user_manager WITH ADMIN grantor;
CREATE ROLE analytics_viewer WITH ADMIN grantor;
CREATE ROLE role_combined; GRANT ROLE role_a TO role_combined; GRANT ROLE role_b TO role_combined;
CREATE ROLE reporting_user WITH ADMIN grantor;
CREATE ROLE temporary_role; GRANT ROLE reporting_user TO temporary_role;
CREATE ROLE complex_role; GRANT ROLE role_a TO complex_role; GRANT ROLE role_b TO complex_role;
CREATE ROLE test_role_2; GRANT ROLE test_role_1 TO test_role_2;
CREATE ROLE role_for_nested_subquery; GRANT ROLE (SELECT * FROM sys.roles WHERE role_name LIKE 'role%') TO role_for_nested_subquery;
